creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
After additional checks it seems that something occurs in latest pkg update
between 1.19.0 and 1.19.1.

In fact there is a couple of issues with pkg, and the most disturbing one
is the fact they didn't bump internal version numbers before release, so
pkg --version still reporting 1.19.0 for both 1.19.0 and 1.19.1.

My best guess about this pkg issue is the addition of 

MAKE_ARGS+=    STATIC_ARG="${STATIC_PIE_ARG}"

in pkg Makefile. I comment this line and pkg seems work as before.
But this is probably not the end of the story as you can see in the
message posted today in the ports ML:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2023-February/003429.html
